findings.description: The 構成 section (s4) consolidates all h3 subsections (概念モデル、クラス図、各クラスの責務、シーケンス図、テーブル定義) into a single section. The source h2 section 構成 contains well over 2000 characters of plain text and has multiple h3 subsections. Per V3 rules, this warrants splitting into separate sections.
findings.source_evidence: Source h3 headings under 構成: 概念モデル (======), クラス図 (========================), シーケンス図 (=================================), テーブル定義 (=================================), plus nested h4s for each table. The combined plain text is far beyond 2000 characters.
